Defendant Stubhub, Inc.S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration Or, In The Alternative, Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Nov-25-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Todd Carpenter of the law offices of Latham & Watkins LLP (todd.carpenter@lw.com) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorney, Nicholas Lange of the law offices of CARLSON LYNCH (Tel: 312.750.1265; Email: nlange@carlsonlynch.com) specially appears appears as co-nsel for plaintiff/opposing party,

Attorney, William Donovan of the law offices of McDermott Will & Emery LLP (Tel: 310.788.4121; Email: Wdonovan@mwe.com) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides on record as reflected in the notes of the Certified Shorthand Reporter.

The matter is not concluded and requires further briefing. Each side is granted leave of court to file of simultaneous supplemental brifs of a maximum of five (5) pages in length, no later than the close of business on November, 2021 and addressing three issues as stated in the record.

Co-counsel, Mr. Lange, is directed to obtain prior to January 23, 2021 an order of court admitting him as counsel pro hac vice.

DEFENDANT STUBHUB, INC. Defendant Stubhub, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration Or, In The Alternative, Stay Proceedings shall be TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION by the Hon Ethan Schulman on November 23, 2021.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
